title: RBI Amends Pension Recovery Rules Because Excess Pension Cannot Be Recovered Without Prior Notice
description:
The RBI has directed Agency Banks not to recover excess government pension without giving prior notice and ensuring compliance with applicable legal principles. The amendment introduces a fair recovery framework and safeguards pensioners' rights.
The post RBI Amends Pension Recovery Rules Because Excess Pension Cannot Be Recovered Without Prior Notice appeared first on TaxGuru.
